items.title: Carmen Maria Machado on Power
items.summary: Plus, the largest survey of Arthur Jafa’s work is coming to New York.

items.title: Phoenix Art Museum Receives Largest Gift of Native American Works
items.summary: A hundred works by Indigenous artists tracing creative resilience over the course of a century will go on view at the institution in August.

items.title: Domestic Arrangements Unfold in Kristof Santy’s Vivid Paintings
items.summary: Known for his vibrant palettes and flattened perspectives, Kristof Santy translates common sights and everyday objects into vivid tableaux. Do stories and artists like this matter to you? Become a Col…

items.title: Beer With a Painter: Samia Halaby
items.summary: At her longtime studio in Tribeca, the Palestinian-American painter discussed her experimentation with color and how she “accidentally stepped into abstraction.”
